steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a 1920x1080 HTML slide with the specified requirements, then verify it by rendering to PNG.

First, I'll write the HTML file with inline CSS:

tool_calls.content_head:

<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Comparison of Key ML Model Architectures</title
